Woodworking Guidebook

Knowledge Center

Reference Library

Sourcing materials directly from our Rishikesh workshop.

Make informed interior decisions. We have compiled technical density ratings, laminate selection criteria, and custom door selection checklists to guide your carpentry.

Read Material Guides

Material Comparison6 min read

HDMR vs Plywood: Which is Best for Bathroom Vanities?

Bathroom vanities face constant humidity, water splashes, and high moisture. Learn why High-Density Moisture Resistant (HDMR) boards have emerged as a superior alternative to traditional BWP plywood.

Interior Guides5 min read

Best Laminate for Modular Kitchen: Suede vs. High Gloss Acrylics

Choosing between high-gloss acrylic sheets and matte suede laminates determines the aesthetic and maintenance of your modular kitchen. We break down scratch resistance and smudges.

Brand Sourcing8 min read

Century Prowud vs. Action TESA HDMR: Density & Moisture Testing

An in-depth analysis of India's two leading HDMR boards. We compare Action TESA's signature green core with Century Prowud's natural wood-fiber composition.

Jagdamba Doors7 min read

How to Choose Interior Doors: Flush Core vs. CNC Membranic Styles

Understand the structural differences between heavy solid-core flush doors and modern seamless CNC membrane doors to pick the right option for your layout.

Cabinet Hardware5 min read

Best Hinges for Heavy Wardrobes: Sizing Hydraulic Soft-Close Buffers

Wardrobe doors finished with 1mm laminate sheets carry significant weight. Sizing your hinges and picking hydraulic cylinders ensures smooth closing.

JagdambaTIMBER WORKS & PLYWOOD

Providing premium lumber, plywood, laminates, and custom cabinetry since 2006. Devoted to master craftsmanship, structural durability, and design heritage.
